titleStmt.title: SII 35.40: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 40. (A.R. No. 79 of 1951-52.) HIRĒKERŪR, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Hero-stone (No. I) set up on the tank-bund.
This inscription refers to Chālukya Vikrama year [50], Viśvāvasu, Mārgaśira-māsa, śu. 9, Wednesday, corresponding to A.D. 1125, November 5, Wednesday.

It records the death of Sātiga son of Bhojanganāraṇayya of Piriyakeṟeyūru in a cattle raid. The deceased hero is euologised as biṭṭērukāraragaṇḍa, maledumachcharisuvaragaṇḍa Paranāriputra etc. This memorial was carved by Mākōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramava¨rśadna 50 viśvāvasusaṁvatsara mā¨rga
śiramāsa suddha 9 budhavāradaṁdu śrī manmahāgrāmaṁ piri
yakeṟeyūra bhōjaṁgaranāraṇayyana suta tuṟu

harivalli sattu śva¨rggastanāda matta sātiga biruda biṭṭēṟukāṟada
gaṇḍa maledumaccarisuvaragaṇḍa maynūṟanālvara daṁḍe
saṁgrāmadhīranacaḷita dha¨ryya paranārīputra bhojaṁgēśvaradē
vara pādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ sivalōkaprāptanāda sāta kaṁḍariśidaṁ mā
kōja
Digital edition of SII 35.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
